title: valeriana wallrothii subsp. intermedia
intro: Valeriana wallrothii subsp. intermedia is a subspecies of the Valeriana wallrothii plant, a perennial herb native to the Americas, characterized by its clusters of small white flowers and fragrant foliage. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Valeriana wallrothii subsp. intermedia include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle cramps and spasms, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and overall well-being. Valeriana wallrothii subsp. intermedia can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
